## Checklist

- [ ] Reloaded the unpacked extension and verified the change works
- [ ] If I changed `content.js` or `utils/*.js`, I mirrored it into `content-bundled.js`
- [ ] If I changed element selection, the annotator and executor stay in lockstep
- [ ] Updated `CLAUDE.md` / `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md` if architecture or the action set changed
